class UserService:
    def get_user(self, user_id: int, tenant_id: str) -> dict:
        return {"id": user_id, "tenant": tenant_id}

    def create_user(self, data: dict, ip_address: str) -> dict:
        return {"id": 1, "created_from": ip_address, **data}


class OrderService:
    def __init__(self, session_id: str):
        self.session_id = session_id

    def get_order(self, order_id: int) -> dict:
        return {"id": order_id, "session": self.session_id}

    def cancel_order(self, order_id: int, reason: str = "none") -> dict:
        return {"id": order_id, "cancelled": True, "reason": reason}
